title: Detective Ducks
short_description: Someone stole the pond's breadcrumbs and every suspect is a duck — read the witness clues, rule ducks out one by one, and arrest the crumb culprit.
description: Someone keeps stealing the pond's breadcrumbs, and every single suspect is a duck. Read the witness clues — hats, sunglasses, bows and umbrellas — rule ducks out one by one, and arrest the crumb culprit. Warning: all four ducks will say 'quack' under questioning; it's not helpful. Every case is a freshly generated process-of-elimination puzzle. Grade bands ramp from two friendly positive clues, to three-clue cases, to tricky lineups that hinge on NOT-clues and careful elimination. A free online logical deduction and reasoning game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the duck that matches every witness clue.
